name: Held Text / Strobe Burst
one_line: A dead-still word whose letters flip through texture-filled frames (texture-clipped fill + per-frame tint + bg color) every ~3 frames, in short bursts pinned to a roll.

match.notes: Candidate dedicated structural_type `held_strobe` (held message + strobe field). Using `dense_multiply` (rubric: dense+HIGH → field/grid/strobe) until the type list grows.

message.notes: the held anchor: word box locked (no x/y/scale), always on screen. Its FILL flips per strobe step — each letterform is a texture PNG (background-clip:text) × a multiply tint (the foreground 'color'). Between bursts it falls back to a solid idleInk word on idle plate. This is the Texture-Flip technique reversed from gruop_4 burst 2.

field.notes: per-frame solid bg color behind the word, hard-set (0ms) on each roll-grid subdivision via a stacked opacity flip-book. Base-template default flickers continuously across the whole clip; cuts back to idleColor (clean black) only at a burst end that is < composition end (so multi-burst plans get black gaps, the continuous default never stops).

frames.notes: JSON [{texture,bg,fill,ink?,pos?}]; texture = file under assets/texture-mask-text/masks/ (66 available). Empty = built-in texture-flip set. Cycled by strobe-step index.

strobePlan.notes: JSON array of bursts {start,end,step|jumps[]}; built from the audiomap. Empty = built-in CONTINUOUS plan [{start:0,end:duration,step:0.125}] (base-template default: flicker the whole clip, never stop). gruop_4-faithful two-burst look = [{start:1.125,end:1.542,step:0.125},{start:2.042,end:2.708,step:0.125}].

decor.notes: blueprint grid + crop border per frame
